channel.title: Energy on Mr Wilde
channel.description: Recent content in Energy on Mr Wilde

item.title: Thorium is the new GOLD
item.description: My Favourite videos on YouTube now are everything from @kirksorensen, by @gordonmcdowell, talking about Thorium and Liquid Fluoride Thorium Reactor. Watch the LFTR explanation on YouTube Right at the start, Kirk outlines an estimated $1000,000,000 return from 1 Tonne of Thorium. This doc I found from 2007, outlines not only is Australia the largest deposit of Thorium on the planet, but we also have 489,000 Tonnes. Thorium in Australia
